To completely remove the application, you may need to run the application's uninstaller (if provided) and/or manually remove the related directories.

To remediate, run the following commands from an administrative command prompt (cmd.exe) and perform the actions below:
- schtasks.exe /End /TN "BetterCloudSolutions_S-1-5-21-1004041552-2598832189-1453792164-1002\WebNavigatorBrowser-StartAtLogin"
- schtasks.exe /Delete /TN "BetterCloudSolutions_S-1-5-21-1004041552-2598832189-1453792164-1002\WebNavigatorBrowser-StartAtLogin" /F

* You can also use the Task Scheduler GUI to remove the tasks if you prefer:
Start Menu > Control Panel > System and Security > Administrative Tools > Task Scheduler
